name: window-title
author: lumine-code
description: Customize the window title with a template

template.title: Window Title Template
template.description: Liquid template for the window title. Variables: `projectTitle`, `projectPaths`, `projectName`, `projectPath`, `fileName`, `filePath`, `relativeFilePath`, `gitHead`, `appName`, `devMode`, `safeMode`. Supports tags such as `{% if devMode %} [Dev]{% endif %}`. If the template renders empty, the default title is kept.
template.default: {% if projectTitle %}{{ projectTitle }}{% else %}{{ fileName }} — {{ projectPaths }}{% endif %}{% if devMode %} [Dev]{% endif %}{% if safeMode %} [Safe]{% endif %}
